name: HB 2165 - Veterans; State Park Fees; Exemption
description: Exempts Veterans from state park fees in Arizona.

name: HB 2230 - Property Tax; Exemption; Veterans
description: Provides property tax exemptions for Veterans in Arizona.

name: HB 2240 - Tuition Waiver; Children; Veterans; Disabilities
description: Waives tuition for children of Veterans with disabilities at Arizona universities.

name: HB 2245 - Veterans Claims Pilot Program
description: Establishes a pilot program to assist Veterans with filing VA claims in Arizona.

name: HB 2373 - Income Tax; Refunds; Veterans' Organizations
description: Allows income tax refund donations to Veterans' organizations in Arizona.

name: HB 2603 - Veterans; Mobile Service Units
description: Creates mobile service units to bring healthcare and benefits services directly to Veterans across Arizona.

name: HB 2607 - Veteran Housing; Reintegration; Appropriation
description: Appropriates funds for Veteran housing and reintegration programs in Arizona.

name: HB 2618 - Veterans; Scholarship Waivers; Counseling; Benefits
description: Provides scholarship waivers and counseling benefits for Veterans in Arizona.

name: HB 2620 - Appropriation; Homeless Veterans; Shelter Services
description: Appropriates funding for shelter services for homeless Veterans in Arizona.

name: HB 2663 - Leaves of Absence; Military Training
description: Ensures employees receive leaves of absence for military training without penalty.

name: HB 2127 - Bronze Star Medal License Plates
description: Creates special license plates for Bronze Star Medal recipients in Arizona.

name: HB 2619 - Technical Correction; Military Affairs
description: Technical corrections to military affairs statutes in Arizona.

name: HB 2599 - Law Enforcement; Military Protective Orders
description: Requires law enforcement to recognize and enforce military protective orders in Arizona.

name: HB 2441 - Special Plate; Adaptive Sports; Recreation
description: Creates special license plates supporting adaptive sports and recreation programs for Veterans.

name: SB 1050 - Veterans; Lifetime State Park Pass
description: Provides Veterans with a lifetime state park pass in Arizona.

name: SB 1065 - Appropriation; Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy; Veterans
description: Appropriates funds for hyperbaric oxygen therapy treatment for Veterans in Arizona.

name: SB 1155 - Game & Fish; Complimentary Licenses; Veterans
description: Provides complimentary hunting and fishing licenses to Veterans through Arizona Game & Fish.

name: SB 1268 - Property Tax; Exemption; Veterans
description: Provides property tax exemptions for Veterans in Arizona.

name: SB 1275 - Diversion Program; Military Members; Veterans
description: Establishes a diversion program for military members and Veterans in the criminal justice system, allowing judicial discretion for mandatory prison sentences.

name: SB 1365 - Property Tax; Exemption; Veterans; Disabilities
description: Provides property tax exemptions for Veterans with disabilities in Arizona.

name: SB 1803 - Veterans' Benefits; Claims; Prohibition
description: Addresses protections related to Veterans' benefits claims processes in Arizona.

name: Veteran Tracking on Arizona Corporation Commission
description: Help track how many Veteran Owned Businesses are in Arizona.
